text:
>   Audit-Trail
>

I noticed that this port is now updated to the current version but there is
no comment on why the funtionality that was requested was not added. Plus I
want to make sure that the reson for it remaining open is because of further
investigation (I hope) to add the functionality to the port and not that this
was just an oversight and was forgotten to be closed.

Thank You
Ron Rosson
